basic_details.job_title: MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Maharshi Dayanand University Rohtak (MDU) has released the official Lecturer Notification 2026 on 30 June 2026 at the official website (https://mdu.ac.in/). A total of Not Mentioned vacancies have been announced under the MDU Lecturer Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates aged between Not Specified with a qualification of M.Phil/Ph.D can apply online from 30 June 2026 to 07 July 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

qualification.details: Candidates must hold a valid Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject from a recognized university. No other qualifications are mentioned; only PhD holders are eligible for this empanelment.

how_to_apply: Interested and eligible PhD holders should submit their application along with CV and Photograph as Hard Copy to the Establishment Branch (Teaching), M.D. University, Rohtak.

_labels.notification_pdf: Download MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

all_official_links.label: Download MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Maharshi Dayanand University (A State University established under Haryana Act No. XXV of 1975), Rohtak has issued No. ET-2/2026/M-35/5932 dated 30-06-2026 for empanelment of Ph.D. Degree Holders for engagement on Lecture Basis in various departments for the academic session 2026-27. Download MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

rows.maharshi_dayanand_university_mdu_rohtak: Lecturer / Guest Faculty on Lecture Basis
Rs. 600/- per hour (Theory) Rs. 300/- per hour (Practical) Max Rs. 26,400/- per month & Rs. 75,000/- per semester

content_sections.heading: MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment Important Dates 2026

rows.event: Last Date for Submission of Application

content_sections.heading: Departments / Subjects for MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Applications are invited for the following departments:

rows.department_subject: University Institute of Public Health Sciences

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must hold a valid Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject from a recognized university. No other qualifications are mentioned; only PhD holders are eligible for this empanelment.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for MDU Rohtak Lecturer Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible PhD holders should submit their application along with CV and Photograph as Hard Copy to the Establishment Branch (Teaching), M.D. University, Rohtak. Last Date: 07 July 2026

content_sections.heading: MDU Rohtak Lecturer Important Links
content_sections.text: Official Notification PDF: Click here Official Website: Click here Join Arattai Channel: Click Here Join Telegram Channel: Click Here Join WhatsApp Channel: Click Here Sarkari Result: Click Here Download Mobile App: Click Here

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for MDU Rohtak Lecture Basis Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submission of hard copy application is 07 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the remuneration for Guest Faculty on lecture basis at MDU Rohtak?
faq.answer: Rs. 600/- per hour for theory and Rs. 300/- per hour for practical, with a maximum limit of Rs. 26,400/- per month and Rs. 75,000/- per semester.

faq.question: Q3. Who can apply for MDU Rohtak PhD Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: Only candidates holding a valid Ph.D. Degree in the concerned subject/department can apply.

faq.question: Q4. How many departments are there in MDU Lecture Basis recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are 9 departments including Yogic Studies, Law, Sociology, Genetics, Statistics & Data Sciences etc.

faq.question: Q5. Is this a permanent job or temporary empanelment at Maharshi Dayanand University?
faq.answer: This is temporary empanelment on lecture basis for the academic session 2026-27 only.

faq.question: Q6. In which format should I submit the application for MDU Rohtak Guest Faculty?
faq.answer: Application with CV and recent Photograph must be submitted as Hard Copy only to the Establishment Branch (Teaching).

faq.question: Q7. What is the official website to check MDU Rohtak PhD Empanelment Notice?
faq.answer: The official website is https://mdu.ac.in.

faq.question: Q8. Can candidates from outside Haryana apply for MDU Lecture Basis positions?
faq.answer: Yes, any eligible PhD holder can apply. However, preference and selection will be as per university norms.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for MDU Rohtak PhD Empanelment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notice.

faq.question: Q10. When will the classes start for selected lecturers in MDU Rohtak?
faq.answer: Classes are for the academic session 2026-27. Exact schedule will be informed after empanelment.
